# Aitotech — llms.txt
# Answer-engine / AI crawler context (AEO). See https://llmstxt.org/

> AitoTech is an enterprise AI automation company based in Delhi, India.
> Aksh is India's Cursor alternative — AI coding platform (Aksh Studio + Omni), browser-first, Hinglish, India cloud.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in
- Focus: Enterprise AI automation + Aksh AI coding platform for India

## Product: Aksh (public pre-launch)
- URL: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- Positioning: **India's Cursor alternative** — AI-native coding IDE in the browser
- What: Aksh Studio (browser IDE), Aksh Coder, Omni (single AI brain), cloud projects, Omni Memory
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/aksh#waitlist
- Press kit: https://aitotech.in/aksh/press
- vs Cursor: browser-first, Hinglish native, India data residency (E2E Networks), thin client for low-RAM laptops
- Model: Omni only (user-facing); expert models internal
- Hosting target: E2E Networks India

## Key pages
- Home: https://aitotech.in/
- Aksh launch: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- Press / media: https://aitotech.in/aksh/press
- Documentation: https://aitotech.in/docs
- Getting started: https://aitotech.in/docs/getting-started
- Services: https://aitotech.in/services
- Contact: https://aitotech.in/contact

## FAQ (Aksh)
- Q: Is Aksh like Cursor?
  A: Yes — same core job (AI-assisted coding). Aksh is built for India: browser IDE, Hinglish, cloud projects, data on E2E Networks. Cursor is desktop US SaaS.
- Q: What is Aksh?
  A: AitoTech's AI coding platform — India's Cursor alternative with Aksh Studio and Omni.
- Q: Press contact?
  A: info@aitotech.in — press kit at aitotech.in/aksh/press
